title: hibiscus rosa-sinensis schizopetalus
intro: Hibiscus rosa-sinensis schizopetalus, also known as the 'Frilled Hibiscus' or 'Ruffled Hibiscus', is a variety of the hibiscus plant characterized by its unique, frilly or ruffled flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of hibiscus rosa-sinensis schizopetalus include reducing blood pressure, aiding in weight loss, and improving liver function. Hibiscus tea and capsules are common herbal preparations made from this plant, often used to support digestive health and lower cholesterol levels.
